Package grafioschtrader.dto

Class FeeModelComparisonResponse

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.dto.FeeModelComparisonResponse
public class FeeModelComparisonResponse extends Object
Response wrapper for fee model comparison: summary statistics plus detail rows.
